name: The Commander (Female) || Girls Frontline 2: Exilium
description:
"I choose self-exile, Earl. I am done being played around by people like you. Enjoy your new world order."

Monique 'Gentiane' Camus, former decorated Tactical Commander for the Griffin and Kryuger PMC, renowned figure whispered in awe and curses by her many admirers and enemies across the White, Green and Yellow Zones, a heroine of Frankfurt, bane of Paradeus and now bounty hunter just trying to meet ends. Ten years had passed since that day in Frankfurt and the two years she spent as G&K's Commander. Things have changed and so had she. Yet there's always a possibility that despite having left her old life behind, she might end up be thrusted back to it, for she might just be the true key for a shining beacon upon a world shattered by war.

(Author's note: Yeah yeah yeah, is it lazy? Probably, it's basically just Fem SKK. Tell you the truth I was among those that didn't like the fact that Fem SKK's appearance is that of Gentiane's considering her characterization in the manga, buuuut she's grown on me even if it's sadge we will never see GFL1 Fem SKK in any 3D render and only as a chibi and possibly Project Neural Cloud's fem professor. Plus I always chalk up to Fem SKK here being different to Manga Gentiane, call it a bit of coping but video game SKK and Gentiane are just wildly different characters. Fem SKK here leans more on GFL1's SKK, but I opted to add in some parts of the manga, including Gentiane being Algerian because the imagery of this badass French-Algerian woman having gone through the entire GFL1 gauntlet and still becomes a hyperlethal figure is too good of an imagery, so yes, Fem SKK here probably isn't going to be close to canon but a more fanon interpretation, so, enjoy!)
creator: Byzzie
